stories.title: Perché è così difficile trovare un corpo nel Basso lago di Garda
stories.summary: Sono trascorsi più di tre giorni dalla scomparsa di Alexandru Olaisiu Sorin, l’uomo che si è tuffato nel Garda, ha salvato un bambino in difficoltà e poi non è più riemerso, e le ricerche proseguono senza sosta nello specchio d’acqua antistante la spiaggia Giamaica a Sirmione. A farsi carico delle operazioni in profondità è, come sempre in questi casi, il Nucleo Sommozzatori del Gruppo Volontari del Garda di Salò, guidato dai responsabili Mauro Fusato e Luca Turrini, subacquei esperti che negli anni hanno restituito ai familiari di molte vittime un corpo su cui piangere. Abbiamo raggiunto telefonicamente Mauro Fusato mentre era in navigazione verso Sirmione per un’altra giornata di ricerche.

stories.title: Ajax opent Europees seizoen tegen Vojvodina • Twente in voorrondes Europa League
stories.summary: Europees voetbal NOS Voetbal vandaag, 18:29 Aangepast vandaag, 18:31 Welkom in ons liveblog over de voorrondes voor de Europa- en Conference League. 20.00 uur: FC Twente - Ferencváros (Europa League) 20.00 uur: Vojvodina - Ajax (Conference League) 18:23 Tadic op bezoek bij Ajax Dusan Tadic zocht in Novi Sad zijn oud-teamgenoten bij Ajax op. De Serviër kwam langs bij het hotel waar de Amsterdammers verblijven in voorbereiding op de wedstrijd tegen Vojvodina. Bij die club maakte Tadic zijn debuut in het betaalde voetbal, waarna hij via FC Groningen, FC Twente en Southampton bij Ajax terecht kwam. Vorige week werd bekend dat NEC hem probeerde in te lijven, maar of dat gaat lukken is de vraag.

stories.title: Roma-Trastevere diretta: segui l'amichevole a Trigoria LIVE
stories.summary: La Roma alza i giri del motore con il secondo test estivo . Dopo la prima amichevole contro la Primavera, i giallorossi di Gasperini sfidano il Trastevere , sempre a Trigoria. La Roma e il suo tecnico a caccia di altre indicazioni dal campo, mentre si aspettano sempre sviluppi e novità dal mercato . Fischio d'inizio alle ore 18 : segui l'amichevole in diretta su Il Corriere dello Sport - Stadio. 18:41 1' - Ghilardi subito pericoloso Subito Ghilardi! Giocata da trequartista in area per il difensore della Roma: sombrero all’avversario e tiro al volo, che però finisce fuori 18:39 1' - Inizia il secondo tempo!

stories.title: Woman arrested after bomb disposal team attend incident
stories.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 10:20 An Garda Síochána requested the assistance of the Irish Defence Forces team (File image) A woman has been arrested after a Defence Forces Explosive Ordnance Disposal (EOD) team was called to assist gardaí at an incident in Co Monaghan. The incident took place on a road near Carrickmacross yesterday. In a statement, gardaí confirmed that they stopped a vehicle travelling on the N2 south of Carrickmacross at around 3pm yesterday afternoon. Following the stop, An Garda Síochána said it requested the assistance of the Irish Defence Forces EOD team.

stories.title: Oroscopo di giovedì 23 luglio: Ariete, Toro e Capricorno al top
stories.summary: Nato sotto il segno dell'Ariete: Manuel Neuer La tua giornata: Oggi, la tua energia da Ariete ti rende un vero kayaker delle opportunità. Navighi le rapide della vita con una padronanza eccezionale, i tuoi colpi di pagaia sono precisi e la tua capacità di leggere le correnti ti permette di anticipare ogni svolta. Ogni mossa è fluida, ogni decisione ti porta avanti con potenza verso la meta desiderata. Non sei un semplice passeggero, ma il timoniere che guida con determinazione la propria rotta, trasformando ogni onda in un'occasione di avanzamento. Amore: Nel pattinaggio sentimentale, oggi esegui un programma libero che incanta.

stories.title: El Tribunal Supremo levanta las medidas cautelares de Aldama a petición de su defensa
stories.summary: La Sala de lo Penal del Tribunal Supremo ha levantado las medidas cautelares del empresario V�ctor de Aldama, condenado en el marco del caso Koldo y premiado por su colaboraci�n clave con la Justicia.

stories.title: SAINT EUSEBE : Les pompiers protègent 4 maisons d'un feu de chaume qui ravage 2,5 hectares
stories.summary: Le sinistre a eu lieu ce jeudi matin. Il était à peine 10 heures, ce jeudi matin, quand l'alerte a été donnée. Un feu venait de se déclarer, sur les hauteurs du Gratoux, sur la commune de Saint-Eusèbe. Un feu qui concernait des chaumes sur une culture de céréales qui avait déjà été moissonnée. Sous le commandement du Lieutenant Didier Mathonat, les pompiers du Creusot, de Montceau, de Joncy et d'Autun, ont d'abord veillé à protéger quatre maisons d'habitations. Le feu a cependant couru sur 2,5 hectares. Les pompiers ont pu profiter de l'assistance d'un drone venu de Paray le Monial. Les pompiers ont également bénéficié du soutien logistique de plusieurs agriculteurs.

stories.title: Ghanaians' ICC petition over migrant attacks 'opportunistic', says South Africa
stories.summary: South Africa has dismissed as "opportunistic" a petition filed at the International Criminal Court (ICC) by two Ghanaians seeking an investigation into attacks on foreigners amid a rise in protests about the country's undocumented migrants. The petition, submitted to The Hague-based court last week, argues the violence could amount to crimes against humanity and accuses the South African government of failing to prevent and punish those responsible. But South Africa's foreign ministry says the petition falls short of the ICC's legal threshold and insists its own legal system can handle such matters. Diplomatic tensions between Ghana and South Africa over the situation have been growing.

stories.title: „Das kann in niemandes Interesse sein“ – Wie sich Wadephul in Südafrika mit Trump anlegt
stories.summary: Mit einer Rede an der Witwatersrand-Universität in Johannesburg hat der deutsche Außenminister Johann Wadephul (CDU) für Aufmerksamkeit gesorgt. Zunächst spricht er vor jungen Studenten über engere Zusammenarbeit und wirtschaftliche Chancen zwischen Deutschland und Südafrika sowie Herausforderungen wie Russlands Krieg in der Ukraine und die Schwächen des UN-Systems. Doch dann kommt er auf den G-20-Gipfel zu sprechen, den Südafrika vergangenes Jahr veranstaltet hat und der im Dezember unter der Schirmherrschaft Trumps in Miami stattfindet. Das trifft in Südafrika einen wunden Punkt. Denn Trump hat sich auf besonders harsche Art mit Präsident Cyril Ramaphosa angelegt.

stories.title: Kombiwette des Tages: Europa-Double-Chance am 23. Juli 2026
stories.summary: SportSight Redaktion Zuletzt aktualisiert 22. Juli 2026 SportSight Widerstandskraft in den europäischen Hinspielen Dynamo Kyiv blieb in der Qualifikation 210 Minuten ohne Gegentor, bei Auda fielen in jedem der vergangenen fünf Spiele unter 2,5 Tore, und Gais ist in vier von fünf Partien ungeschlagen. Diese defensiv stabilen Profile prägen eine Dreierkombination mit abgesicherten Heimtipps und einem kontrollierten Spiel in Bukarest. Bei einer Gesamtquote von 6 setzt die Kombiwette auf Teams, die zuletzt schwer zu schlagen waren, statt auf klare Siege angewiesen zu sein.

stories.title: Vorfall auf Rheinkirmes | Wie oft werden Fahrgeschäfte kontrolliert?
stories.summary: Vorfall auf Rheinkirmes | Wie oft werden Fahrgeschäfte kontrolliert? Auf Facebook wird aktuell über den Facebook-Post einer Mutter diskutiert. Laut dem Post soll sich ihre elfjährige Tochter auf einem Fahrgeschäft verletzt haben, weil sie nicht richtig gesichert gewesen sei. Der Polizei Düsseldorf liegt seit Dienstagnachmittag eine Anzeige wegen fahrlässiger Körperverletzung gegen den Betreiber des Fahrgeschäfts vor, wie ein Polizeisprecher bestätigt. Nun wird zu dem Fall ermittelt. Die Polizei steht nach eigener Aussage bei den Ermittlungen noch ganz am Anfang. Und auch die Mutter wollte sich auf WDR-Anfrage nicht zu dem Vorfall äußern.

stories.title: Rangers buy Serbia's Dragojevic from Partizan
stories.summary: Rangers have signed Serbia midfielder Vanja Dragojevic from Partizan Belgrade for an undisclosed fee. The 20-year-old has signed a four-year-contract with the Scottish Premiership club, with the option for a further year. Dragojevic, who has two caps for his country, captained Partizan after coming through their youth ranks. "We are really excited to bring Vanja on board," said manager Derek McInnes. "He's got huge potential, really exciting attributes, and boasts the character to play in this environment. "To captain a club the size of FK Partizan at such a young age tells you everything you need to know about the respect he commands and the leadership qualities he already possesses.

stories.title: Mathématiques : les médailles Fields 2026 consacrent l’émergence des Chinois
stories.summary: Cet article vous est offert Pour lire gratuitement cet article réservé aux abonnés, connectez-vous Se connecter Vous n'êtes pas inscrit sur Le Monde ? Inscrivez-vous gratuitement Sciences Mathématiques Mathématiques Mathématiques La récompense la plus réputée de cette discipline pour les chercheurs de moins de 40 ans a été décernée, jeudi, à deux professeurs chinois, Hong Wang et Yu Deng, ainsi qu’à l’Américain John Pardon et au Canadien Jacob Tsimerman. Article réservé aux abonnés Il va falloir s’y faire. La Chine commence à récolter les fruits de ses investissements dans la science et les mathématiques en particulier.

stories.title: La ‘prioridad nacional’ pactada por PP y Vox amenaza con discriminar a militares y otras profesiones con alta movilidad
stories.summary: La prioridad nacional ha pasado de ser un principio político plasmado en los acuerdos entre PP y Vox en cuatro autonomías (Extremadura, Aragón, Castilla y León y Andalucía) a una ley. Por vez primera en España, una norma con rango legal, los Presupuestos de la Generalitat Valenciana para 2026, incluye este eslogan acuñado por la extrema derecha francesa de Le Pen. El presidente valenciano, Juan Francisco Perez Llorca, ha aceptado el 99% de las enmiendas de Vox para sacar adelante las cuentas de su gobierno, incluido el polémico principio, pese a que el consejero de Economía, José Antonio Rovira, lo descartó con el argumento de que no tenía cabida en un proyecto de “números y cuentas”.

stories.title: The Hundred 2026 results: Manchester Super Giants thrash dismal London Spirit at Lord's
stories.summary: The Manchester Super Giants dominated the London Spirit at Lord's, winning by seven wickets after bowling the hosts out for just 80 runs. Ryana MacDonald-Gay starred with impressive figures of 4 for 17, while the Super Giants chased down the target in just 59 balls, led by Paige Scholfield's unbeaten 22. This match marked the Super Giants' first game under their new name, having previously been known as the Manchester Originals.

stories.title: Inzidënt sön la via Normale sön la Marmolada
stories.summary: Le socurs alpin y speleologich dl Trentin te Fascia é gnü cherdé por dui intervënc tl medem momënt incö 22 de messé. N pröm intervënt sön le dlaciá dla Marmolada, sön la pert dl Trentin, te teritore comunal de Cianacëi. L'alarm é gnü dé incër les 11:00 por n alpinist de 40 agn dla Republica Ceca che é slisoré sön la via Normale. L'alpinist ê dassú sön tru y scebëgn che al ê atrezé él slisoré y s'á fat me. Intenü dl inzidënt s'á n grup de cin'd'atres porsones che ê ince sön tru y che á spo dé l'alarm scrí le socurs alpin y speleologich te n comunicat stampa. Al é spo gnü damané l'intervënt dl joler y le tecnich dl elisocurs é gnü lascé jö sön l'post cun la binda por rové pormez al ferí.

stories.title: Is 2026 the Commonwealth Games' last dance or a future-proofing revamp?
stories.summary: Is 2026 the Commonwealth Games' last dance or a future-proofing revamp? The 2026 Commonwealth Games were thrown into doubt when its original hosts, the Australian state of Victoria, pulled out in 2023 citing spiraling costs. That decision took even the leaders of Commonwealth Sport by surprise. After more than a year of uncertainty, Glasgow stepped in to host the Games for the second time, following on from the highly successful event in the Scottish city in 2014. But, with limited preparation time a significant factor, the Games' return to Glasgow a much smaller event.

stories.title: Who impressed our Power Rankings judges in Belgium?
stories.summary: Kimi Antonelli impressed Power Rankings judges with his sixth victory of the season at the Belgian Grand Prix, extending his championship lead to 45 points after a strong performance including pole position and a convincing win. Charles Leclerc also had another strong weekend, securing the lead through strategic pit stops under VSC.

stories.title: "Zapatero y el PSOE se están apoyando mutuamente porque saben que si esto se cae, se cae todo", según Álvaro Nieto
stories.summary: La información publicada este miércoles por "The Objetive", que sostiene que José Luis Zapatero ha contactado con el PSOE para rearmar su estrategia tras la confesión de su presunto testaferro, ha centrado el análisis de Álvaro Nieto en "Espejo Público". El periodista considera que la reacción del expresidente y del PSOE responde a una estrategia coordinada. "Zapatero y el PSOE se están apoyando mutuamente porque saben que si esto se cae, se cae todo", afirmó. Además, recordó que, si finalmente se acreditara algún tipo de tráfico de influencias, tiene que existir también el delito de prevaricación", subrayando las .

stories.title: "Willy Hernangómez cobraría una novena parte del salario que tenía en el Barça"
stories.summary: Willy Hernangómez sigue sin equipo de cara a la próxima temporada. El exjugador del Barça se encuentra libre tras finalizar su etapa de tres campañas en el conjunto azulgrana. Cursos complicados en los que el internacional español no cumplió con las altas expectativas generadas con su desembarco en la capital catalana. Más allá de algún rumor que le situaba en Baskonia tras el verano, el futuro de Hernangómez no ha contado con excesivos rumores sobre posibles destinaciones. Su rendimiento en el Barça le ha lastrado, y a día de hoy, y con la continuidad de Paolo Galbiati en el conjunto vitoriano, verle en un equipo de Euroliga se antoja bastante improbable.

stories.title: Kai Trump jokes 'I'd rather look like my mom' in Donald Trump Jr snub
stories.summary: Kai Trump seemed to deliver a lighthearted jab at father Donald Trump Jr. after confessing she'd "rather look like" her mother, Vanessa Trump, while discussing how significantly her looks have evolved over recent months. The 19-year-old granddaughter of President Donald Trump shared these remarks in a recent YouTube vlog while preparing for the 2026 ESPYs, where she experienced her debut red carpet appearance.

stories.title: Pertur o la historia de un comunista abertzale
stories.summary: Este 23 de julio de 2026 se cumplen 50 años de la desaparición de Eduardo Moreno Bergaretxe, más conocido con el apócope de perturbado , ‘Pertur’, líder ideológico de ETA político-militar. Constan declaraciones que lo sitúan en Donibane Lohizune (San Juan de Luz, en Lapurdi) aquella mañana antes de que se esfumara o, mejor dicho, fuera esfumado . Nunca apareció su cuerpo. Nos situamos en un momento extraño: Franco había muerto hacía ocho meses y se empezaba a hablar, aunque sin este aparataje lingüístico, de una transición democrática. El caso de su desaparición, aún sin resolver, precede al de Naparra (1980), Lasa y Zabala (1983) o Popo Larre.

stories.title: Oscar Voters Rave Over Christopher Nolan’s ‘The Odyssey’ at First Academy Screenings: ‘The Definitive Filmmaker of Our Time’
stories.summary: “What was the song of the sirens like?” When it comes to Oscar voters, like Odysseus, the answer is: “All the things you wanted to be.” The Oscar race for 2027 seems to have found its center of gravity, and its front-runner that will be shepherded under the Universal banner. Christopher Nolan ‘s “ The Odyssey ,” the Homer adaptation that shattered the director’s own global opening record with $264 million worldwide, began its formal courtship of Academy voters this week with a series of member screenings on both coasts and abroad. If the early temperature reading is correct, and the buzz holds, the film enters the fall corridor as the one everybody else has to beat.

stories.title: Red Bull zet stip op de horizon: "Dat weet Verstappen ook"
stories.summary: Red Bull toont een aardig herstel na een relatief moeizame start van het Formule 1-seizoen 2026. Teambaas Laurent Mekies weet ook dat er nog wat werk te verzetten is om weer terug te keren naar de dominante periodes van weleer. Red Bull kende tot nu toe twee écht dominante periodes in de Formule 1. Van 2010 tot en met 2013 veroverde Sebastian Vettel vier wereldtitels op rij, waarna Max Verstappen dat tussen 2021 en 2024 eveneens voor elkaar kreeg. In die periodes pakte de Oostenrijkse renstal bovendien zes constructeurstitels, met de meest recente in 2023. Voorafgaand aan het Formule 1-seizoen 2026 stond Red Bull echter voor een enorme uitdaging.

stories.title: Yemen's Houthis attack Saudi tanker as US launches more Iran strikes
stories.summary: Yemen’s Houthi rebels struck a Saudi oil tanker in the Red Sea late Wednesday, igniting a fire, as the U.S. launched its 12th straight night of strikes on Iran. Saudi Arabia confirmed the attack, while U.S. President Trump warned the Houthis of “major military punishment” if they strike again. Iran said two people were killed in the U.S. strikes, and Jordan and Kuwait intercepted incoming missiles and drones.

stories.title: Hönnequell-Schule: Schüler tauchen im Freibad, touren durch Neuenrade und lernen Verteidigungstechniken
stories.summary: come-on.de Lennetal Neuenrade Stand: 23.07.2026, 17:00 Uhr Kommentare Sifu Michael Becker zeigt hier, wie man sich aus einem Würgegriff befreien kann. © Peter von der Beck Die Hönnequell-Schule hat einen Projekttag zu Sport und Gesundheit veranstaltet. Die Schüler konnten Tauchen, Badminton, Mountainbikefahren oder auch Selbstverteidigung ausprobieren. Neuenrade – Eine sicher entspannte letzte Schulwoche erlebten die Schüler der Hönnequell- Schule : Unter anderem hatte die Schulleitung ein spezielles Programm zum Thema Sport und Gesundheit aufgelegt. „HQS bewegt-gemeinsam in eine gesunde Zukunft“ war der Projekttag überschrieben.

stories.title: Musmarra: "Ecco sorprendentemente qual è il primo nome per l'Inter. Ero convinto fosse..."
stories.summary: Scegli FcInter1908 come tuo sito preferito su Google: clicca qui I tifosi dell'Inter attendono uno scatto della società sul mercato. Sul suo canale YouTube, Alfio Musmarra ha fatto il punto della situazione, con un nome in primo piano: "L'Inter continua a lavorare su Romero, oggi è lui sorprendentemente il nome in primo piano per il mercato. Doveva essere l'esterno destro, e invece è il Romero. Al Mondiale ha fatto vedere buone cose, ma nell'arco della stagione è sempre soggetto a qualche espulsione e bisogna tenerne conto. Si fa una valutazione alta per lui, sono sorpreso perché non mi sembra uno che ti cambia il volto della difesa".

stories.title: Preview: HJK Helsinki vs Coleraine - prediction, team news, lineups
stories.summary: HJK Helsinki and Coleraine will both kick off their European campaigns on Thursday, when they meet at the Bolt Arena in the first leg of their UEFA Conference League second-qualifying-round tie. The two sides both enter qualifying in this stage with the visitors playing their first competitive football of the new season since the Charity Shield and their hosts in the midst of a domestic campaign.

stories.title: Athletes and Execs Join Forces at Variety’s Inaugural Sports and Entertainment Studio, Featuring Russell Wilson, Jimmie Johnson and Jay Williams
stories.summary: As the worlds of entertainment and sports continue to overlap, Variety held its inaugural Sports & Entertainment Studio in New York, featuring Super Bowl-winning quarterback Russell Wilson , NASCAR legend Jimmie Johnson and ESPN studio analyst Jay Williams , as well as top executives from State Farm, PepsiCo and Teads. On July 16, Variety reporters Joe Otterson, Marlow Stern and Brian Steinberg led conversations in the New York City studio about the players’ and executives’ respective careers, growing sport fandoms, and how networks and brands can collaborate and connect to better reach consumers during an explosive time for media.
entities: Variety’s Inaugural Sports and Entertainment Studio

stories.title: ‘Odyssey’ Popcorn Buckets Help Fuel a $100 Million Market
stories.summary: The release of Christopher Nolan's blockbuster "The Odyssey" has sparked a booming market for collectible popcorn buckets, contributing to a $100 million industry. Fans are eagerly purchasing limited-edition buckets, with many designs already close to selling out. As the film continues to draw audiences, the demand for these unique memorabilia items is expected to rise even further.

stories.title: Camavinga no se rinde
stories.summary: Eduardo Camavinga se quedó sin Mundial tras una temporada irregular en el Real Madrid. Su nombre aparece ahora en muchas listas de transferibles, pero él no escucha por ahora ofertas y mantiene el plan que trazó nada más acabar la campaña y conocer que no estaba en la lista de Deschamps. El ex jugador del Rennes puso entonces el contador a cero para volver a ver al mejor Camavinga. Tras un corto periodo de descanso, se marchó a Boston donde asistió a Harvard Business School para realizar un programa ejecutivo de cuatro días sobre el Negocio del Entretenimiento, los Medios y el Deporte (BEMS).

stories.title: Weekend weather set to change following warm spell
stories.summary: Met Éireann warns of a significant weather change this weekend, with unsettled conditions expected across the country following a warm spell. Saturday will bring cloudier skies and scattered rain, particularly in the west and north, while temperatures will range from 15 to 22 degrees. Sunday will continue the trend with more rain and drizzle, although some areas in the southeast may see sunnier breaks later in the day.

stories.title: Amazon puts Luna cloud-streamed games like Fallout 4 inside Prime Video
stories.summary: Amazon’s Prime Video now lets U.S. and U.K. users stream and play cloud-based games like Fallout 4 directly inside the app on Fire TV devices. The new Games tab merges Prime Gaming, Amazon Game Studios and Luna into one casual-friendly hub, with more titles and regions expected later this year. The move mirrors Netflix’s push into interactive gaming for TV viewers.

stories.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
stories.summary: President Donald Trump says Saudi Arabia must recognize Israel to secure a U.S. nuclear energy deal, with no uranium enrichment allowed. The agreement hinges on Riyadh joining the Abraham Accords, which have already led five countries to normalize ties with Israel. Saudi Arabia has previously insisted it would not recognize Israel without a Palestinian state.

stories.title: ¿Por qué estas gráficas sobre el fenómeno de El Niño tienen preocupados a los científicos?
stories.summary: ¿Por qué estas gráficas sobre el fenómeno de El Niño tienen preocupados a los científicos? Los datos que están recopilando centros de investigación en varios países sugieren que El Niño se va a comportar de manera muy particular, frente a los otros que ha habido. Estas son las razones de por qué quienes le siguen la pista a este fenómeno están con los pelos de punta. 23 de julio de 2026 - 11:46 a. m. Imagen que muestra las Anomalías de la Temperatura Superficial en la región Niño 3.4 en el Océano Pacífico, de donde los científicos recopilan datos para saber cómo podría ser El Niño.

stories.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
stories.summary: France has evacuated 20,000 people in the south-west as wildfires spread in the Gironde region, with 3,400 hectares burned around the Bay of Arcachon. Authorities moved 8,800 more residents as 700 firefighters battled the flames overnight. Authorities warned conditions would worsen as temperatures rise and winds strengthen.

stories.title: « Il préfère que je lui parle en italien »: on a passé le chrono derrière Benjamin Thomas
stories.summary: Aux abords du bus de Cofidis, on prévient : « à cause d'un accident, on a mis 2h30 à venir au départ depuis notre hôtel au lieu d'une heure, ce n’est pas idéal... » Malgré ce contretemps, Benjamin Thomas apparaît d'abord détendu. Puis, rapidement, le champion olympique de l'omnium en 2024 se met dans sa bulle, pour préparer le contre-la-montre de mardi, entre Evian et Thonon. Un peu plus loin, son directeur sportif Roberto Damiani prépare la voiture. Les vélos de remplacement sont bien fixés sur la toît, et les roues chargées à l'arrière, à côté du siège du mécanicien. Il faut aussi régler la radio, qui permettra de communiquer avec le coureur girondin.

stories.title: EA Sports FC 27 coming to Nintendo Switch 2, Switch
stories.summary: EA today officially announced EA Sports FC 27, which is planned for both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. The game arrives on September 25, 2026. Kylian Mbappé is the cover stars for EA Sports FC 27’s standard version and Ultimate Edition. Jude Bellingham will be on the cover of the Ultimate Edition Plus. Here are first details about the title: Inspired by the FC player community and the connection shared by fans worldwide, EA Sports FC 27 introduces new ways to play The World’s Game, including: The Grounds: A new social football playground, The Grounds, represents a side of football that’s never existed in EA Sports FC, until now.

stories.title: Ex-governor convicted of murdering a pregnant student in Kenya
stories.summary: Former Migori Governor Okoth Obado has been convicted of orchestrating the murder of pregnant student Sharon Otieno in Kenya. The court found that Obado supplied the motive and funds for the crime, while his associates facilitated the execution and concealment of the offense. All three men are now in custody as they await sentencing, marking a significant moment in a case that captured national attention.

stories.title: Business rate cut not enough, says Michelin-star chef
stories.summary: A 20% cut in business rates for pubs and live music venues from April will save thousands but Michelin-starred chef Alex Claridge warns it won’t fix the financial crisis facing independent restaurants. Claridge, whose Birmingham restaurant The Wilderness holds a Michelin star, says soaring costs and thin margins leave many venues barely breaking even despite full houses. Industry leaders argue deeper reforms are needed to prevent closures across the sector.

stories.title: Gary Lineker among millionaires asking Andy Burnham to tax them more
stories.summary: A group of 120 wealthy Britons, including Gary Lineker and Brian Eno, has urged Prime Minister Andy Burnham to raise taxes on the richest. The signatories, organised by Patriotic Millionaires, propose a 2% tax on wealth over £10 million to fund public services. The group argues this would reduce inequality and boost investment in the UK.

stories.title: Gary Lineker joins calls for wealth tax - The Latest
stories.summary: More than 100 UK millionaires, including former footballer Gary Lineker, have signed an open letter urging Prime Minister Andy Burnham to introduce a wealth tax. The signatories argue they can afford higher taxes to support public services. Campaigners say the idea is gaining momentum amid rising inequality.

stories.title: Raków Częstochowa - Valletta FC [RELACJA NA ŻYWO]
stories.summary: © 2026 Ringier Axel Springer Polska sp. z o.o. stories.title: Rangers sign 'huge potential' in Partizan captain Dragojevic
stories.summary: Rangers have signed Serbia midfielder Vanja Dragojevic from Partizan Belgrade on a four-year deal with a one-year option. The 20-year-old, who captained Partizan and has two national team caps, joins for an undisclosed fee. Manager Derek McInnes says he expects Dragojevic to strengthen the squad immediately.

stories.title: Anderson gets Man City move he craved as £116m deal done
stories.summary: Manchester City have completed the £116 million signing of midfielder Joachim Anderson from Nottingham Forest. The deal surpasses the club’s previous record fee and follows Anderson’s standout season in which he led the Premier League in touches and duels won. He will join a City side now managed by Enzo Maresca after Pep Guardiola’s departure.

stories.title: NASA’s MAVEN Illuminates New Understanding of Auroras at Mars
stories.summary: NASA's MAVEN mission has revealed that auroras on Mars form similarly to those on Earth, driven by comparable mechanisms despite the differences in their magnetic fields. This groundbreaking research, published in Nature Communications, enhances our understanding of Martian atmospheric processes. Although the MAVEN spacecraft lost contact in December 2025 and was declared unrecoverable in June 2026, its findings continue to inform future Mars exploration efforts.

stories.title: Malisheva vs Hibernian: Uefa Conference League qualifying updates & match report
stories.summary: This match was like a greatest hits album of a Scottish side in the early rounds of European qualifying. Largely unheard of opposition who were only formed 10 years ago and had not won a single European tie before last week, on a pitch which cut up so badly players were falling all over the place. The only missing factor was sweltering heat, although Hibs played the first half as though it was over 30C given how sluggish they looked. Gray predicted his side would face an aggressive, motivated and intense team and his analysis was spot on.

stories.title: BBC Inside Science
stories.summary: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announced on July 23, 2026 that the military will screen personnel aged 30 and older for testosterone deficiency and offer voluntary hormone replacement therapy. The move aims to maintain a "healthy, capable fighting force." Officials did not specify how many service members may be affected.

stories.title: Super Giants thrash dismal Spirit at Lord's
stories.summary: Manchester Super Giants crushed London Spirit by seven wickets at Lord's on Sunday. Chasing 81, they reached 86-3 in 59 balls with Sophie Scholfield top-scoring on 22. Ryana MacDonald-Gay took 4-17 as Spirit were bowled out for 80 all out.

stories.title: Microsoft is testing free, ad-supported cloud gaming for Xbox Insiders
stories.summary: Microsoft is testing free, ad-supported cloud gaming for Xbox Insiders today, with sessions limited to one hour for games you already own. Ads will only play before sessions start and are optional if you have a paid subscription. The test runs for a limited time to explore more affordable ways to play Xbox games.

stories.title: ‘We Will All Die From Ebola Here’: Virus Stalks Crowded Camps in Congo
stories.summary: There are a million people displaced by violence in the epicenter. They live in dangerous conditions and are fighting the virus with very little clean water.

stories.title: Chaos Breaks Out at Border Crossings in Iraq
stories.summary: Videos verified by The New York Times show border crossings in southern Iraq becoming the latest target in the hostilities in the Middle East.

stories.title: The only way to stop petrol pump thieves | Brief letters
stories.summary: A sharp rise in petrol pump thefts has pushed UK garages to demand pre-payment before releasing fuel. Police report over 1,200 incidents this year alone, with thieves siphoning fuel or driving off without paying. Industry leaders now urge drivers to carry cash or a card to avoid delays at the pump.

stories.title: Crews Move Artemis IV Liquid Hydrogen Tank
stories.summary: Crews at NASA’s Michoud Assembly Facility in New Orleans moved the 130-foot Artemis IV liquid hydrogen tank on May 15, 2026. The tank will power the SLS rocket’s core stage with super-cold propellant for four RS-25 engines. Next, it heads to a test building for final checks before integration.

stories.title: Trump Prepares Yet Another Strategy to Resurrect Global Tariffs
stories.summary: The administration’s 10 percent global tariffs are set to expire at midnight, but officials have been preparing replacements.

stories.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
stories.summary: A groundbreaking study involving 3.1 million Danish participants has found that long-term exposure to road traffic noise increases the risk of Parkinson’s disease by 3% for every 11.5 decibel rise in noise levels. Published in Jama Neurology, the research highlights potential biological pathways linking noise exposure to the disease, emphasizing the importance of quiet living spaces to mitigate risks. This study, the largest of its kind, tracked participants over 18 years, underscoring the significant health implications of environmental noise.

stories.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
stories.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

offbeat.title: Perché è così difficile trovare un corpo nel Basso lago di Garda
offbeat.summary: Sono trascorsi più di tre giorni dalla scomparsa di Alexandru Olaisiu Sorin, l’uomo che si è tuffato nel Garda, ha salvato un bambino in difficoltà e poi non è più riemerso, e le ricerche proseguono senza sosta nello specchio d’acqua antistante la spiaggia Giamaica a Sirmione. A farsi carico delle operazioni in profondità è, come sempre in questi casi, il Nucleo Sommozzatori del Gruppo Volontari del Garda di Salò, guidato dai responsabili Mauro Fusato e Luca Turrini, subacquei esperti che negli anni hanno restituito ai familiari di molte vittime un corpo su cui piangere. Abbiamo raggiunto telefonicamente Mauro Fusato mentre era in navigazione verso Sirmione per un’altra giornata di ricerche.

offbeat.title: Ajax opent Europees seizoen tegen Vojvodina • Twente in voorrondes Europa League
offbeat.summary: Europees voetbal NOS Voetbal vandaag, 18:29 Aangepast vandaag, 18:31 Welkom in ons liveblog over de voorrondes voor de Europa- en Conference League. 20.00 uur: FC Twente - Ferencváros (Europa League) 20.00 uur: Vojvodina - Ajax (Conference League) 18:23 Tadic op bezoek bij Ajax Dusan Tadic zocht in Novi Sad zijn oud-teamgenoten bij Ajax op. De Serviër kwam langs bij het hotel waar de Amsterdammers verblijven in voorbereiding op de wedstrijd tegen Vojvodina. Bij die club maakte Tadic zijn debuut in het betaalde voetbal, waarna hij via FC Groningen, FC Twente en Southampton bij Ajax terecht kwam. Vorige week werd bekend dat NEC hem probeerde in te lijven, maar of dat gaat lukken is de vraag.

offbeat.title: Roma-Trastevere diretta: segui l'amichevole a Trigoria LIVE
offbeat.summary: La Roma alza i giri del motore con il secondo test estivo . Dopo la prima amichevole contro la Primavera, i giallorossi di Gasperini sfidano il Trastevere , sempre a Trigoria. La Roma e il suo tecnico a caccia di altre indicazioni dal campo, mentre si aspettano sempre sviluppi e novità dal mercato . Fischio d'inizio alle ore 18 : segui l'amichevole in diretta su Il Corriere dello Sport - Stadio. 18:41 1' - Ghilardi subito pericoloso Subito Ghilardi! Giocata da trequartista in area per il difensore della Roma: sombrero all’avversario e tiro al volo, che però finisce fuori 18:39 1' - Inizia il secondo tempo!

offbeat.title: Woman arrested after bomb disposal team attend incident
offbeat.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 10:20 An Garda Síochána requested the assistance of the Irish Defence Forces team (File image) A woman has been arrested after a Defence Forces Explosive Ordnance Disposal (EOD) team was called to assist gardaí at an incident in Co Monaghan. The incident took place on a road near Carrickmacross yesterday. In a statement, gardaí confirmed that they stopped a vehicle travelling on the N2 south of Carrickmacross at around 3pm yesterday afternoon. Following the stop, An Garda Síochána said it requested the assistance of the Irish Defence Forces EOD team.

offbeat.title: Oroscopo di giovedì 23 luglio: Ariete, Toro e Capricorno al top
offbeat.summary: Nato sotto il segno dell'Ariete: Manuel Neuer La tua giornata: Oggi, la tua energia da Ariete ti rende un vero kayaker delle opportunità. Navighi le rapide della vita con una padronanza eccezionale, i tuoi colpi di pagaia sono precisi e la tua capacità di leggere le correnti ti permette di anticipare ogni svolta. Ogni mossa è fluida, ogni decisione ti porta avanti con potenza verso la meta desiderata. Non sei un semplice passeggero, ma il timoniere che guida con determinazione la propria rotta, trasformando ogni onda in un'occasione di avanzamento. Amore: Nel pattinaggio sentimentale, oggi esegui un programma libero che incanta.

offbeat.title: El Tribunal Supremo levanta las medidas cautelares de Aldama a petición de su defensa
offbeat.summary: La Sala de lo Penal del Tribunal Supremo ha levantado las medidas cautelares del empresario V�ctor de Aldama, condenado en el marco del caso Koldo y premiado por su colaboraci�n clave con la Justicia.

offbeat.title: SAINT EUSEBE : Les pompiers protègent 4 maisons d'un feu de chaume qui ravage 2,5 hectares
offbeat.summary: Le sinistre a eu lieu ce jeudi matin. Il était à peine 10 heures, ce jeudi matin, quand l'alerte a été donnée. Un feu venait de se déclarer, sur les hauteurs du Gratoux, sur la commune de Saint-Eusèbe. Un feu qui concernait des chaumes sur une culture de céréales qui avait déjà été moissonnée. Sous le commandement du Lieutenant Didier Mathonat, les pompiers du Creusot, de Montceau, de Joncy et d'Autun, ont d'abord veillé à protéger quatre maisons d'habitations. Le feu a cependant couru sur 2,5 hectares. Les pompiers ont pu profiter de l'assistance d'un drone venu de Paray le Monial. Les pompiers ont également bénéficié du soutien logistique de plusieurs agriculteurs.

offbeat.title: Ghanaians' ICC petition over migrant attacks 'opportunistic', says South Africa
offbeat.summary: South Africa has dismissed as "opportunistic" a petition filed at the International Criminal Court (ICC) by two Ghanaians seeking an investigation into attacks on foreigners amid a rise in protests about the country's undocumented migrants. The petition, submitted to The Hague-based court last week, argues the violence could amount to crimes against humanity and accuses the South African government of failing to prevent and punish those responsible. But South Africa's foreign ministry says the petition falls short of the ICC's legal threshold and insists its own legal system can handle such matters. Diplomatic tensions between Ghana and South Africa over the situation have been growing.

offbeat.title: „Das kann in niemandes Interesse sein“ – Wie sich Wadephul in Südafrika mit Trump anlegt
offbeat.summary: Mit einer Rede an der Witwatersrand-Universität in Johannesburg hat der deutsche Außenminister Johann Wadephul (CDU) für Aufmerksamkeit gesorgt. Zunächst spricht er vor jungen Studenten über engere Zusammenarbeit und wirtschaftliche Chancen zwischen Deutschland und Südafrika sowie Herausforderungen wie Russlands Krieg in der Ukraine und die Schwächen des UN-Systems. Doch dann kommt er auf den G-20-Gipfel zu sprechen, den Südafrika vergangenes Jahr veranstaltet hat und der im Dezember unter der Schirmherrschaft Trumps in Miami stattfindet. Das trifft in Südafrika einen wunden Punkt. Denn Trump hat sich auf besonders harsche Art mit Präsident Cyril Ramaphosa angelegt.

offbeat.title: Kombiwette des Tages: Europa-Double-Chance am 23. Juli 2026
offbeat.summary: SportSight Redaktion Zuletzt aktualisiert 22. Juli 2026 SportSight Widerstandskraft in den europäischen Hinspielen Dynamo Kyiv blieb in der Qualifikation 210 Minuten ohne Gegentor, bei Auda fielen in jedem der vergangenen fünf Spiele unter 2,5 Tore, und Gais ist in vier von fünf Partien ungeschlagen. Diese defensiv stabilen Profile prägen eine Dreierkombination mit abgesicherten Heimtipps und einem kontrollierten Spiel in Bukarest. Bei einer Gesamtquote von 6 setzt die Kombiwette auf Teams, die zuletzt schwer zu schlagen waren, statt auf klare Siege angewiesen zu sein.

offbeat.title: Vorfall auf Rheinkirmes | Wie oft werden Fahrgeschäfte kontrolliert?
offbeat.summary: Vorfall auf Rheinkirmes | Wie oft werden Fahrgeschäfte kontrolliert? Auf Facebook wird aktuell über den Facebook-Post einer Mutter diskutiert. Laut dem Post soll sich ihre elfjährige Tochter auf einem Fahrgeschäft verletzt haben, weil sie nicht richtig gesichert gewesen sei. Der Polizei Düsseldorf liegt seit Dienstagnachmittag eine Anzeige wegen fahrlässiger Körperverletzung gegen den Betreiber des Fahrgeschäfts vor, wie ein Polizeisprecher bestätigt. Nun wird zu dem Fall ermittelt. Die Polizei steht nach eigener Aussage bei den Ermittlungen noch ganz am Anfang. Und auch die Mutter wollte sich auf WDR-Anfrage nicht zu dem Vorfall äußern.

offbeat.title: Rangers buy Serbia's Dragojevic from Partizan
offbeat.summary: Rangers have signed Serbia midfielder Vanja Dragojevic from Partizan Belgrade for an undisclosed fee. The 20-year-old has signed a four-year-contract with the Scottish Premiership club, with the option for a further year. Dragojevic, who has two caps for his country, captained Partizan after coming through their youth ranks. "We are really excited to bring Vanja on board," said manager Derek McInnes. "He's got huge potential, really exciting attributes, and boasts the character to play in this environment. "To captain a club the size of FK Partizan at such a young age tells you everything you need to know about the respect he commands and the leadership qualities he already possesses.

offbeat.title: Mathématiques : les médailles Fields 2026 consacrent l’émergence des Chinois
offbeat.summary: Cet article vous est offert Pour lire gratuitement cet article réservé aux abonnés, connectez-vous Se connecter Vous n'êtes pas inscrit sur Le Monde ? Inscrivez-vous gratuitement Sciences Mathématiques Mathématiques Mathématiques La récompense la plus réputée de cette discipline pour les chercheurs de moins de 40 ans a été décernée, jeudi, à deux professeurs chinois, Hong Wang et Yu Deng, ainsi qu’à l’Américain John Pardon et au Canadien Jacob Tsimerman. Article réservé aux abonnés Il va falloir s’y faire. La Chine commence à récolter les fruits de ses investissements dans la science et les mathématiques en particulier.

offbeat.title: La ‘prioridad nacional’ pactada por PP y Vox amenaza con discriminar a militares y otras profesiones con alta movilidad
offbeat.summary: La prioridad nacional ha pasado de ser un principio político plasmado en los acuerdos entre PP y Vox en cuatro autonomías (Extremadura, Aragón, Castilla y León y Andalucía) a una ley. Por vez primera en España, una norma con rango legal, los Presupuestos de la Generalitat Valenciana para 2026, incluye este eslogan acuñado por la extrema derecha francesa de Le Pen. El presidente valenciano, Juan Francisco Perez Llorca, ha aceptado el 99% de las enmiendas de Vox para sacar adelante las cuentas de su gobierno, incluido el polémico principio, pese a que el consejero de Economía, José Antonio Rovira, lo descartó con el argumento de que no tenía cabida en un proyecto de “números y cuentas”.

offbeat.title: The Hundred 2026 results: Manchester Super Giants thrash dismal London Spirit at Lord's
offbeat.summary: The Manchester Super Giants dominated the London Spirit at Lord's, winning by seven wickets after bowling the hosts out for just 80 runs. Ryana MacDonald-Gay starred with impressive figures of 4 for 17, while the Super Giants chased down the target in just 59 balls, led by Paige Scholfield's unbeaten 22. This match marked the Super Giants' first game under their new name, having previously been known as the Manchester Originals.

offbeat.title: Inzidënt sön la via Normale sön la Marmolada
offbeat.summary: Le socurs alpin y speleologich dl Trentin te Fascia é gnü cherdé por dui intervënc tl medem momënt incö 22 de messé. N pröm intervënt sön le dlaciá dla Marmolada, sön la pert dl Trentin, te teritore comunal de Cianacëi. L'alarm é gnü dé incër les 11:00 por n alpinist de 40 agn dla Republica Ceca che é slisoré sön la via Normale. L'alpinist ê dassú sön tru y scebëgn che al ê atrezé él slisoré y s'á fat me. Intenü dl inzidënt s'á n grup de cin'd'atres porsones che ê ince sön tru y che á spo dé l'alarm scrí le socurs alpin y speleologich te n comunicat stampa. Al é spo gnü damané l'intervënt dl joler y le tecnich dl elisocurs é gnü lascé jö sön l'post cun la binda por rové pormez al ferí.

offbeat.title: Is 2026 the Commonwealth Games' last dance or a future-proofing revamp?
offbeat.summary: Is 2026 the Commonwealth Games' last dance or a future-proofing revamp? The 2026 Commonwealth Games were thrown into doubt when its original hosts, the Australian state of Victoria, pulled out in 2023 citing spiraling costs. That decision took even the leaders of Commonwealth Sport by surprise. After more than a year of uncertainty, Glasgow stepped in to host the Games for the second time, following on from the highly successful event in the Scottish city in 2014. But, with limited preparation time a significant factor, the Games' return to Glasgow a much smaller event.

offbeat.title: Who impressed our Power Rankings judges in Belgium?
offbeat.summary: Kimi Antonelli impressed Power Rankings judges with his sixth victory of the season at the Belgian Grand Prix, extending his championship lead to 45 points after a strong performance including pole position and a convincing win. Charles Leclerc also had another strong weekend, securing the lead through strategic pit stops under VSC.

offbeat.title: "Zapatero y el PSOE se están apoyando mutuamente porque saben que si esto se cae, se cae todo", según Álvaro Nieto
offbeat.summary: La información publicada este miércoles por "The Objetive", que sostiene que José Luis Zapatero ha contactado con el PSOE para rearmar su estrategia tras la confesión de su presunto testaferro, ha centrado el análisis de Álvaro Nieto en "Espejo Público". El periodista considera que la reacción del expresidente y del PSOE responde a una estrategia coordinada. "Zapatero y el PSOE se están apoyando mutuamente porque saben que si esto se cae, se cae todo", afirmó. Además, recordó que, si finalmente se acreditara algún tipo de tráfico de influencias, tiene que existir también el delito de prevaricación", subrayando las .

offbeat.title: "Willy Hernangómez cobraría una novena parte del salario que tenía en el Barça"
offbeat.summary: Willy Hernangómez sigue sin equipo de cara a la próxima temporada. El exjugador del Barça se encuentra libre tras finalizar su etapa de tres campañas en el conjunto azulgrana. Cursos complicados en los que el internacional español no cumplió con las altas expectativas generadas con su desembarco en la capital catalana. Más allá de algún rumor que le situaba en Baskonia tras el verano, el futuro de Hernangómez no ha contado con excesivos rumores sobre posibles destinaciones. Su rendimiento en el Barça le ha lastrado, y a día de hoy, y con la continuidad de Paolo Galbiati en el conjunto vitoriano, verle en un equipo de Euroliga se antoja bastante improbable.

offbeat.title: Kai Trump jokes 'I'd rather look like my mom' in Donald Trump Jr snub
offbeat.summary: Kai Trump seemed to deliver a lighthearted jab at father Donald Trump Jr. after confessing she'd "rather look like" her mother, Vanessa Trump, while discussing how significantly her looks have evolved over recent months. The 19-year-old granddaughter of President Donald Trump shared these remarks in a recent YouTube vlog while preparing for the 2026 ESPYs, where she experienced her debut red carpet appearance.

offbeat.title: Pertur o la historia de un comunista abertzale
offbeat.summary: Este 23 de julio de 2026 se cumplen 50 años de la desaparición de Eduardo Moreno Bergaretxe, más conocido con el apócope de perturbado , ‘Pertur’, líder ideológico de ETA político-militar. Constan declaraciones que lo sitúan en Donibane Lohizune (San Juan de Luz, en Lapurdi) aquella mañana antes de que se esfumara o, mejor dicho, fuera esfumado . Nunca apareció su cuerpo. Nos situamos en un momento extraño: Franco había muerto hacía ocho meses y se empezaba a hablar, aunque sin este aparataje lingüístico, de una transición democrática. El caso de su desaparición, aún sin resolver, precede al de Naparra (1980), Lasa y Zabala (1983) o Popo Larre.

offbeat.title: Red Bull zet stip op de horizon: "Dat weet Verstappen ook"
offbeat.summary: Red Bull toont een aardig herstel na een relatief moeizame start van het Formule 1-seizoen 2026. Teambaas Laurent Mekies weet ook dat er nog wat werk te verzetten is om weer terug te keren naar de dominante periodes van weleer. Red Bull kende tot nu toe twee écht dominante periodes in de Formule 1. Van 2010 tot en met 2013 veroverde Sebastian Vettel vier wereldtitels op rij, waarna Max Verstappen dat tussen 2021 en 2024 eveneens voor elkaar kreeg. In die periodes pakte de Oostenrijkse renstal bovendien zes constructeurstitels, met de meest recente in 2023. Voorafgaand aan het Formule 1-seizoen 2026 stond Red Bull echter voor een enorme uitdaging.

offbeat.title: Hönnequell-Schule: Schüler tauchen im Freibad, touren durch Neuenrade und lernen Verteidigungstechniken
offbeat.summary: come-on.de Lennetal Neuenrade Stand: 23.07.2026, 17:00 Uhr Kommentare Sifu Michael Becker zeigt hier, wie man sich aus einem Würgegriff befreien kann. © Peter von der Beck Die Hönnequell-Schule hat einen Projekttag zu Sport und Gesundheit veranstaltet. Die Schüler konnten Tauchen, Badminton, Mountainbikefahren oder auch Selbstverteidigung ausprobieren. Neuenrade – Eine sicher entspannte letzte Schulwoche erlebten die Schüler der Hönnequell- Schule : Unter anderem hatte die Schulleitung ein spezielles Programm zum Thema Sport und Gesundheit aufgelegt. „HQS bewegt-gemeinsam in eine gesunde Zukunft“ war der Projekttag überschrieben.

offbeat.title: Musmarra: "Ecco sorprendentemente qual è il primo nome per l'Inter. Ero convinto fosse..."
offbeat.summary: Scegli FcInter1908 come tuo sito preferito su Google: clicca qui I tifosi dell'Inter attendono uno scatto della società sul mercato. Sul suo canale YouTube, Alfio Musmarra ha fatto il punto della situazione, con un nome in primo piano: "L'Inter continua a lavorare su Romero, oggi è lui sorprendentemente il nome in primo piano per il mercato. Doveva essere l'esterno destro, e invece è il Romero. Al Mondiale ha fatto vedere buone cose, ma nell'arco della stagione è sempre soggetto a qualche espulsione e bisogna tenerne conto. Si fa una valutazione alta per lui, sono sorpreso perché non mi sembra uno che ti cambia il volto della difesa".

offbeat.title: Preview: HJK Helsinki vs Coleraine - prediction, team news, lineups
offbeat.summary: HJK Helsinki and Coleraine will both kick off their European campaigns on Thursday, when they meet at the Bolt Arena in the first leg of their UEFA Conference League second-qualifying-round tie. The two sides both enter qualifying in this stage with the visitors playing their first competitive football of the new season since the Charity Shield and their hosts in the midst of a domestic campaign.

offbeat.title: Camavinga no se rinde
offbeat.summary: Eduardo Camavinga se quedó sin Mundial tras una temporada irregular en el Real Madrid. Su nombre aparece ahora en muchas listas de transferibles, pero él no escucha por ahora ofertas y mantiene el plan que trazó nada más acabar la campaña y conocer que no estaba en la lista de Deschamps. El ex jugador del Rennes puso entonces el contador a cero para volver a ver al mejor Camavinga. Tras un corto periodo de descanso, se marchó a Boston donde asistió a Harvard Business School para realizar un programa ejecutivo de cuatro días sobre el Negocio del Entretenimiento, los Medios y el Deporte (BEMS).

offbeat.title: Weekend weather set to change following warm spell
offbeat.summary: Met Éireann warns of a significant weather change this weekend, with unsettled conditions expected across the country following a warm spell. Saturday will bring cloudier skies and scattered rain, particularly in the west and north, while temperatures will range from 15 to 22 degrees. Sunday will continue the trend with more rain and drizzle, although some areas in the southeast may see sunnier breaks later in the day.

offbeat.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
offbeat.summary: President Donald Trump says Saudi Arabia must recognize Israel to secure a U.S. nuclear energy deal, with no uranium enrichment allowed. The agreement hinges on Riyadh joining the Abraham Accords, which have already led five countries to normalize ties with Israel. Saudi Arabia has previously insisted it would not recognize Israel without a Palestinian state.

offbeat.title: ¿Por qué estas gráficas sobre el fenómeno de El Niño tienen preocupados a los científicos?
offbeat.summary: ¿Por qué estas gráficas sobre el fenómeno de El Niño tienen preocupados a los científicos? Los datos que están recopilando centros de investigación en varios países sugieren que El Niño se va a comportar de manera muy particular, frente a los otros que ha habido. Estas son las razones de por qué quienes le siguen la pista a este fenómeno están con los pelos de punta. 23 de julio de 2026 - 11:46 a. m. Imagen que muestra las Anomalías de la Temperatura Superficial en la región Niño 3.4 en el Océano Pacífico, de donde los científicos recopilan datos para saber cómo podría ser El Niño.

offbeat.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
offbeat.summary: France has evacuated 20,000 people in the south-west as wildfires spread in the Gironde region, with 3,400 hectares burned around the Bay of Arcachon. Authorities moved 8,800 more residents as 700 firefighters battled the flames overnight. Authorities warned conditions would worsen as temperatures rise and winds strengthen.

offbeat.title: « Il préfère que je lui parle en italien »: on a passé le chrono derrière Benjamin Thomas
offbeat.summary: Aux abords du bus de Cofidis, on prévient : « à cause d'un accident, on a mis 2h30 à venir au départ depuis notre hôtel au lieu d'une heure, ce n’est pas idéal... » Malgré ce contretemps, Benjamin Thomas apparaît d'abord détendu. Puis, rapidement, le champion olympique de l'omnium en 2024 se met dans sa bulle, pour préparer le contre-la-montre de mardi, entre Evian et Thonon. Un peu plus loin, son directeur sportif Roberto Damiani prépare la voiture. Les vélos de remplacement sont bien fixés sur la toît, et les roues chargées à l'arrière, à côté du siège du mécanicien. Il faut aussi régler la radio, qui permettra de communiquer avec le coureur girondin.

offbeat.title: EA Sports FC 27 coming to Nintendo Switch 2, Switch
offbeat.summary: EA today officially announced EA Sports FC 27, which is planned for both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. The game arrives on September 25, 2026. Kylian Mbappé is the cover stars for EA Sports FC 27’s standard version and Ultimate Edition. Jude Bellingham will be on the cover of the Ultimate Edition Plus. Here are first details about the title: Inspired by the FC player community and the connection shared by fans worldwide, EA Sports FC 27 introduces new ways to play The World’s Game, including: The Grounds: A new social football playground, The Grounds, represents a side of football that’s never existed in EA Sports FC, until now.

offbeat.title: Ex-governor convicted of murdering a pregnant student in Kenya
offbeat.summary: Former Migori Governor Okoth Obado has been convicted of orchestrating the murder of pregnant student Sharon Otieno in Kenya. The court found that Obado supplied the motive and funds for the crime, while his associates facilitated the execution and concealment of the offense. All three men are now in custody as they await sentencing, marking a significant moment in a case that captured national attention.

offbeat.title: Raków Częstochowa - Valletta FC [RELACJA NA ŻYWO]
offbeat.summary: © 2026 Ringier Axel Springer Polska sp. z o.o. Powered by Ring Publishing Developed by RAS Tech Systematyczne pobieranie treści, danych lub informacji z tej strony internetowej (web scraping), jak również eksploracja tekstu i danych (TDM) (w tym pobieranie i eksploracyjna analiza danych, indeksowanie stron internetowych, korzystanie z treści lub przeszukiwanie z pobieraniem baz danych), czy to przez roboty, web crawlers, oprogramowanie, narzędzia lub dowolną manualną lub zautomatyzowaną metodą, w celu tworzenia lub rozwoju oprogramowania, w tym m.in. szkolenia systemów uczenia maszynowego lub sztucznej inteligencji (AI), bez uprzedniej, wyraźnej zgody Ringier Axel Springer Polska sp.

offbeat.title: Malisheva vs Hibernian: Uefa Conference League qualifying updates & match report
offbeat.summary: This match was like a greatest hits album of a Scottish side in the early rounds of European qualifying. Largely unheard of opposition who were only formed 10 years ago and had not won a single European tie before last week, on a pitch which cut up so badly players were falling all over the place. The only missing factor was sweltering heat, although Hibs played the first half as though it was over 30C given how sluggish they looked. Gray predicted his side would face an aggressive, motivated and intense team and his analysis was spot on.

entertainment.title: Oscar Voters Rave Over Christopher Nolan’s ‘The Odyssey’ at First Academy Screenings: ‘The Definitive Filmmaker of Our Time’
entertainment.summary: “What was the song of the sirens like?” When it comes to Oscar voters, like Odysseus, the answer is: “All the things you wanted to be.” The Oscar race for 2027 seems to have found its center of gravity, and its front-runner that will be shepherded under the Universal banner. Christopher Nolan ‘s “ The Odyssey ,” the Homer adaptation that shattered the director’s own global opening record with $264 million worldwide, began its formal courtship of Academy voters this week with a series of member screenings on both coasts and abroad. If the early temperature reading is correct, and the buzz holds, the film enters the fall corridor as the one everybody else has to beat.

entertainment.title: Athletes and Execs Join Forces at Variety’s Inaugural Sports and Entertainment Studio, Featuring Russell Wilson, Jimmie Johnson and Jay Williams
entertainment.summary: As the worlds of entertainment and sports continue to overlap, Variety held its inaugural Sports & Entertainment Studio in New York, featuring Super Bowl-winning quarterback Russell Wilson , NASCAR legend Jimmie Johnson and ESPN studio analyst Jay Williams , as well as top executives from State Farm, PepsiCo and Teads. On July 16, Variety reporters Joe Otterson, Marlow Stern and Brian Steinberg led conversations in the New York City studio about the players’ and executives’ respective careers, growing sport fandoms, and how networks and brands can collaborate and connect to better reach consumers during an explosive time for media.
entities: Variety’s Inaugural Sports and Entertainment Studio

breaking.title: Yemen's Houthis attack Saudi tanker as US launches more Iran strikes
breaking.summary: Yemen’s Houthi rebels struck a Saudi oil tanker in the Red Sea late Wednesday, igniting a fire, as the U.S. launched its 12th straight night of strikes on Iran. Saudi Arabia confirmed the attack, while U.S. President Trump warned the Houthis of “major military punishment” if they strike again. Iran said two people were killed in the U.S. strikes, and Jordan and Kuwait intercepted incoming missiles and drones.

breaking.title: ‘We Will All Die From Ebola Here’: Virus Stalks Crowded Camps in Congo
breaking.summary: There are a million people displaced by violence in the epicenter. They live in dangerous conditions and are fighting the virus with very little clean water.

breaking.title: Chaos Breaks Out at Border Crossings in Iraq
breaking.summary: Videos verified by The New York Times show border crossings in southern Iraq becoming the latest target in the hostilities in the Middle East.

crisis.title: ‘Odyssey’ Popcorn Buckets Help Fuel a $100 Million Market
crisis.summary: The release of Christopher Nolan's blockbuster "The Odyssey" has sparked a booming market for collectible popcorn buckets, contributing to a $100 million industry. Fans are eagerly purchasing limited-edition buckets, with many designs already close to selling out. As the film continues to draw audiences, the demand for these unique memorabilia items is expected to rise even further.

crisis.title: Business rate cut not enough, says Michelin-star chef
crisis.summary: A 20% cut in business rates for pubs and live music venues from April will save thousands but Michelin-starred chef Alex Claridge warns it won’t fix the financial crisis facing independent restaurants. Claridge, whose Birmingham restaurant The Wilderness holds a Michelin star, says soaring costs and thin margins leave many venues barely breaking even despite full houses. Industry leaders argue deeper reforms are needed to prevent closures across the sector.

crisis.title: Trump Prepares Yet Another Strategy to Resurrect Global Tariffs
crisis.summary: The administration’s 10 percent global tariffs are set to expire at midnight, but officials have been preparing replacements.

tech.title: Amazon puts Luna cloud-streamed games like Fallout 4 inside Prime Video
tech.summary: Amazon’s Prime Video now lets U.S. and U.K. users stream and play cloud-based games like Fallout 4 directly inside the app on Fire TV devices. The new Games tab merges Prime Gaming, Amazon Game Studios and Luna into one casual-friendly hub, with more titles and regions expected later this year. The move mirrors Netflix’s push into interactive gaming for TV viewers.

tech.title: Microsoft is testing free, ad-supported cloud gaming for Xbox Insiders
tech.summary: Microsoft is testing free, ad-supported cloud gaming for Xbox Insiders today, with sessions limited to one hour for games you already own. Ads will only play before sessions start and are optional if you have a paid subscription. The test runs for a limited time to explore more affordable ways to play Xbox games.

politics.title: Gary Lineker among millionaires asking Andy Burnham to tax them more
politics.summary: A group of 120 wealthy Britons, including Gary Lineker and Brian Eno, has urged Prime Minister Andy Burnham to raise taxes on the richest. The signatories, organised by Patriotic Millionaires, propose a 2% tax on wealth over £10 million to fund public services. The group argues this would reduce inequality and boost investment in the UK.

politics.title: Gary Lineker joins calls for wealth tax - The Latest
politics.summary: More than 100 UK millionaires, including former footballer Gary Lineker, have signed an open letter urging Prime Minister Andy Burnham to introduce a wealth tax. The signatories argue they can afford higher taxes to support public services. Campaigners say the idea is gaining momentum amid rising inequality.

sports.title: Rangers sign 'huge potential' in Partizan captain Dragojevic
sports.summary: Rangers have signed Serbia midfielder Vanja Dragojevic from Partizan Belgrade on a four-year deal with a one-year option. The 20-year-old, who captained Partizan and has two national team caps, joins for an undisclosed fee. Manager Derek McInnes says he expects Dragojevic to strengthen the squad immediately.

sports.title: Anderson gets Man City move he craved as £116m deal done
sports.summary: Manchester City have completed the £116 million signing of midfielder Joachim Anderson from Nottingham Forest. The deal surpasses the club’s previous record fee and follows Anderson’s standout season in which he led the Premier League in touches and duels won. He will join a City side now managed by Enzo Maresca after Pep Guardiola’s departure.

sports.title: Super Giants thrash dismal Spirit at Lord's
sports.summary: Manchester Super Giants crushed London Spirit by seven wickets at Lord's on Sunday. Chasing 81, they reached 86-3 in 59 balls with Sophie Scholfield top-scoring on 22. Ryana MacDonald-Gay took 4-17 as Spirit were bowled out for 80 all out.

facts.title: NASA’s MAVEN Illuminates New Understanding of Auroras at Mars
facts.summary: NASA's MAVEN mission has revealed that auroras on Mars form similarly to those on Earth, driven by comparable mechanisms despite the differences in their magnetic fields. This groundbreaking research, published in Nature Communications, enhances our understanding of Martian atmospheric processes. Although the MAVEN spacecraft lost contact in December 2025 and was declared unrecoverable in June 2026, its findings continue to inform future Mars exploration efforts.

facts.title: BBC Inside Science
facts.summary: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announced on July 23, 2026 that the military will screen personnel aged 30 and older for testosterone deficiency and offer voluntary hormone replacement therapy. The move aims to maintain a "healthy, capable fighting force." Officials did not specify how many service members may be affected.

facts.title: Crews Move Artemis IV Liquid Hydrogen Tank
facts.summary: Crews at NASA’s Michoud Assembly Facility in New Orleans moved the 130-foot Artemis IV liquid hydrogen tank on May 15, 2026. The tank will power the SLS rocket’s core stage with super-cold propellant for four RS-25 engines. Next, it heads to a test building for final checks before integration.

health.title: The only way to stop petrol pump thieves | Brief letters
health.summary: A sharp rise in petrol pump thefts has pushed UK garages to demand pre-payment before releasing fuel. Police report over 1,200 incidents this year alone, with thieves siphoning fuel or driving off without paying. Industry leaders now urge drivers to carry cash or a card to avoid delays at the pump.

health.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
health.summary: A groundbreaking study involving 3.1 million Danish participants has found that long-term exposure to road traffic noise increases the risk of Parkinson’s disease by 3% for every 11.5 decibel rise in noise levels. Published in Jama Neurology, the research highlights potential biological pathways linking noise exposure to the disease, emphasizing the importance of quiet living spaces to mitigate risks. This study, the largest of its kind, tracked participants over 18 years, underscoring the significant health implications of environmental noise.

health.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
health.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.
